name: Virtual World Dragon - Longlong
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>電</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>でん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>脳</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>のう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>堺</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>かい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>りゅう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>龍</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ロン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>々</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ロン</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc:
2+ Level 3 monsters with the same Type and Attribute
Your opponent cannot target this card with card effects while it has Xyz Material. When your opponent activates the effect of a monster with an Attribute that is not on their field, while they control a face-up monster (Quick Effect): You can detach 2 materials from this card; negate the activation. You can only use this effect of "Virtual World Dragon - Longlong" once per turn.

action: Applies effects if Xyz Material is attached
Detaches multiple Xyz Materials as cost
mst: Cannot be targeted by card effects
Negates the activation of your opponent's Effect Monster's effect
